onboarding.subtitle: Stay focused on your Salah by blocking digital distractions.
onboarding.locationDesc: We use your location to calculate accurate prayer times offline.
onboarding.blockingTitle: Aqimo blocks your apps at prayer time.
onboarding.blockingDesc: Your apps will be blocked until you confirm "I Prayed."
onboarding.commitmentTitle: Make this commitment; Allah will reward you.
onboarding.commitmentDesc: You're on the right path. Track your daily prayers. Build consistency.

journal.title: Journal
journal.reflectPrompt: Missing a prayer is an opportunity to understand what held you back.
journal.placeholder: What prevented you from praying? How can you establish it tomorrow?
journal.emptyDesc: Reflections recorded when you miss a prayer will appear here.
